question: Will Trump restart Project Freedom by May 31? [Polymarket]
reason: No definitive announcement from Trump or U.S.
evidence: On May 5, 2026, President Trump paused Project Freedom to finalize a deal with Iran, stating the operation would be paused for a short period. ([theguardian.com](https://www.theguardian.com/world/2026/may/06/trump-project-freedom-strait-of-hormuz-ships-iran-ceasefire?utm_source=openai))

As of May 26, 2026, U.S. Central Command denied reports of restarting Project Freedom, confirming that the operation has not resumed. ([dawn.com](https://www.dawn.com/news/amp/2003303?utm_source=openai))
